description_for_human: Clinical-research compliance: reconcile staff authorization timing, evaluate Copilot agents for regulated-data governance, and map gaps to cited controls.
description_for_model: Palis provides clinical-research compliance tools. reconcile_authorization checks what study staff actually DID against what they were AUTHORIZED to do at the time, catching tasks performed before delegation was effective or PI-signed, expired GCP certifications, and undelegated performers. check_authorization is a pre-task gate. inventory_agents, evaluate_agent, map_to_controls, and generate_attestation inventory and score Microsoft 365 Copilot agents for PHI and clinical-study-record governance and translate gaps into specific cited regulatory controls (21 CFR Part 11, HIPAA, ICH-GCP, GDPR). Use these tools for any clinical-research compliance, authorization-timing, PHI-handling, audit-readiness, or agent-governance request. Never assert a requirement without a grounded citation; describe findings as 'gap - review required', not 'non-compliant'.

functions.name: inventory_agents
functions.description: List the Microsoft 365 Copilot agents in the tenant and the data each one touches.

functions.name: evaluate_agent
functions.description: Score one agent's regulated-data governance posture and return the gaps. Requires agent_id.

functions.name: map_to_controls
functions.description: Translate an agent's gaps into specific cited regulatory controls. Requires agent_id.

functions.name: generate_attestation
functions.description: Produce an IRB/FDA-style control-by-control evidence pack for an agent. Requires agent_id.

functions.name: reconcile_authorization
functions.description: Reconcile what study staff actually did against the signed delegation log and credential timeline; catches tasks performed before delegation was effective, expired certifications, and undelegated performers.

functions.name: check_authorization
functions.description: Pre-task authorization gate: confirm a staff member is authorized to perform a task on a given date before they act.

tools.name: inventory_agents

tools.description: Pre-task authorization gate for a staff member, task, and date.

proposed_date.description: ISO date the task would be performed.
